headline: Levi Strauss Stock Could Be a Good Fit for Your Portfolio

headline: PVH Corp.'s Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, DTC Revenues Rise 1% Y/Y
summary: PVH beats Q4 estimates with rising sales and earnings, driven by Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger strength, while outlining cautious 2026 growth amid tariff pressures.

headline: Coty Faces Promotional Pressure: Is Pricing Power Weakening?
summary: COTY faces rising promotional pressure as weaker pricing power in Prestige and the U.S. beauty market weighs on sales growth and margins.

headline: Ralph Lauren targets supply chain improvements in new green strategy
summary: Ralph Lauren has unveiled a new phase in its Global Citizenship & Sustainability (GC&S) strategy, an “intentional approach” to driving positive impact across the company’s value chain.
